name: Christmas Delight Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt marshmallows over hot water until very soft.
2. Grind figs, dates, nuts, and coconut.
3. Chop and drain the cherries.
4. Mix all ingredients together.
5. Pat mixture out to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut into squares.
7. Roll in granulated sugar.
